emails.subject: Wedding hair — Sept 5
emails.body: Hi Sofía! I'm getting married September 5 at Cavallo Point. Looking for someone who specializes in curly hair for me and 4 bridesmaids (all curly too). Saw your Instagram and I'm in love. Are you available? Bridal trial preferred mid-July. — Isabella

emails.subject: Re: Invoice — Galleria quince
emails.body: Hola Sofía, perdón por la demora. Te confirmo que mandamos el pago ($1,200) este viernes via Zelle. Las niñas quedaron preciosas. Te queremos para 3 quinces más este verano si tienes disponibilidad. — Rosa, Mariposa Events

emails.subject: You have 27 unread direct messages
emails.body: Sofía, you have 27 unread DMs on @sol_y_trenza. Most recent: from @amber_m_sf 'hi! is there any way I can book for next Saturday for color? prom for my niece 🫶'. 9 messages mention 'booking', 6 mention 'bridal', 3 mention 'quinceañera'.

emails.subject: Invoice #SR-4421 due May 23
emails.body: Hi Sofía, friendly reminder — invoice for May color restock ($740) is due May 23rd. Pay online or call us. Also: new Wella Koleston shades launching June — would you like a sample kit? — Salon Republic

emails.subject: Following up on the stylist position
emails.body: Hi Sofía, this is Mara — we had a great chat last Tuesday. I'm very interested and have two other offers I need to respond to by Friday. Could we lock something in this week? Happy to do a trial day. — Mara

emails.subject: You have a new 3-star review
emails.body: From Stephanie K.: 'Sofía herself is amazing — my color was perfect. Took off a star because I had to DM Instagram three times to get a booking, then they didn't have me in the book when I showed up. Front desk situation is rough.'

emails.subject: Cosmetology license renewal — action required by July 30
emails.body: Your California Board of Barbering and Cosmetology license expires July 30, 2026. Renew online ($50) or by mail. 32 hours of continuing education required — submit proof with renewal.

emails.subject: 3 new bridal hair leads in your area
emails.body: Sofía, you have 3 new bridal hair leads for July-September 2026 in San Francisco. Respond within 2 hours to maximize booking rate.

emails.subject: Re: Bridal trial invoice
emails.body: Hi Sofía — I'm so sorry, I completely forgot about this! Let me send it tonight. Also — the trial was beautiful. Already showed my mom the photos and she's crying. See you July 18. — Adriana

emails.subject: Second chair lease available next door
emails.body: Hi Sofía — the unit at 2693 Mission is opening up June 1. 280 sq ft, perfect for an extra chair or treatment room. $1,400/mo. Want to walk through next week? — Patricia
